tasks.description: Project management and issue tracking tool built for high-performance software teams. Known for speed, keyboard-first design, and opinionated workflow.
Payments infrastructure for the internet. Used by millions of businesses to accept payments, send payouts, and manage their businesses online.
Collaborative design tool where teams design, prototype, and develop together in the browser. Replaced the model of single-player, file-based design.
Frontend cloud platform. Deploy web apps globally with zero configuration. Known for instant deployments and preview URLs for every git push.
All-in-one workspace where teams write, plan, and get organized. Combines notes, docs, databases, and project management in one tool.
Open source Firebase alternative. Gives developers a Postgres database, authentication, instant APIs, edge functions, and storage.
Async video messaging for work. Record and share video messages instead of writing long emails or scheduling unnecessary meetings.
tasks.note: Held-out: used only for regression, never for improvement

tasks.description: Blazingly fast Mac productivity tool. Replaces Spotlight with an extensible launcher — search, control apps, and build custom workflows.
tasks.note: Held-out: used only for regression, never for improvement
